item.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum-linked protocols lose $35M in three simultaneous bridge attacks on July 23
U.S. Senate leadership signals CLARITY Act unlikely to pass before August recess; White House disputes the forecast
Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon endorses CLARITY Act; JPMorgan's Dimon warns bill could disadvantage traditional banks
Federal regulators miss GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin rules; statute effective date defaults to January 2027
Tether's USDT faces 2-year compliance window under GENIUS Act before potential exclusion from U.S. crypto platforms
Ostium suffers $18M USDC loss in oracle manipulation exploit as DeFi oracle attacks continue to rise in 2026
Circle receives OCC approval to operate as a U.S. national trust bank, initially providing institutional digital asset custody
EDX Markets raises $76M Series C led by SBI Holdings to expand institutional crypto trading and seek a U.S. trust charter
SEC plans to propose Regulation Crypto this month, offering temporary exemptions from securities registration for certain digital assets
EU's MiCA regulation is fully in force; crypto firms without licenses are now barred from serving customers across all 27 member states
Morgan Stanley receives preliminary OCC approval to establish a national digital asset trust bank covering custody, staking and lending
Ethereum Institutional nonprofit launches to support banks and asset managers evaluating Ethereum for tokenization and stablecoins
State Street launches government money market fund to capture reserve demand from a fast-growing stablecoin market
Crypto vault deposits reach $131B as of April 2026, up from $24B three years earlier; SEC flags securities law risk for some structures
OCC closes public comment period today on GENIUS Act AML and sanctions compliance rules for stablecoin issuers
